summary: Iteration 137: Production Schedules & Advanced Cake Tools - All 25 backend tests passed. Tested 9 production-schedules endpoints (summary, grouped-by-day, list, get, create, acknowledge, acknowledge-all, seed/reset) and 2 new cake-assets endpoints (advanced-tools with 10 tools, airbrush-nozzles with 4 nozzles). Regression tests for existing cake-assets (textures, piping, flowers, templates, stands, order) all passed.

verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_seed_reset: PASS - POST /api/production-schedules/seed/reset wipes and reseeds 6 demo items
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_summary: PASS - GET /api/production-schedules/summary returns total_open, buckets (overdue/today/tomorrow/this_week/later), critical_count, next_up, headline
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_grouped_by_day: PASS - GET /api/production-schedules/grouped-by-day returns groups array with date, label, count, bucket, items[]
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_list: PASS - GET /api/production-schedules/ returns items with relative.label/bucket on each, no _id leak
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_list_filter_kind: PASS - Filter by kind=cake works correctly
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_list_filter_bucket: PASS - Filter by bucket=tomorrow works correctly
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_get_single: PASS - GET /api/production-schedules/{id} returns all fields (client_name, due_date, delivery_time, venue, beo_id, flavor_profile, decorations, dietary_notes, assigned_chef, assigned_decorator, relative)
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_create: PASS - POST /api/production-schedules/ creates new reminder with sched- prefix ID
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_acknowledge: PASS - POST /api/production-schedules/{id}/acknowledge sets acknowledged=true, item disappears from summary
verified_features.PRODUCTION_SCHEDULES_acknowledge_all: PASS - POST /api/production-schedules/acknowledge-all acknowledges all 6 open items
verified_features.CAKE_ASSETS_advanced_tools_categories: PASS - Categories: coloring, sculpting, showpiece, painting, print, finishing
verified_features.CAKE_ASSETS_advanced_tools_filter: PASS - Filter by category=coloring returns 3 tools (airbrush, stencils, luster-dust)
verified_features.CAKE_ASSETS_airbrush_ui_field: PASS - Airbrush tool has ui='airbrush_3d_modal' and inputs field
verified_features.CAKE_ASSETS_airbrush_nozzles_4: PASS - GET /api/cake-assets/airbrush-nozzles returns 4 nozzles (noz-fine, noz-medium, noz-broad, noz-splatter)
verified_features.CAKE_ASSETS_nozzles_structure: PASS - Each nozzle has spread/falloff/opacity/best_for, splatter nozzle has splatter=True
verified_features.REGRESSION_order_costing: PASS - POST /api/cake-assets/order produces full cake order with costing (food_cost, labor_hours, labor_cost, total_cost, suggested_price, per_serving), no _id leak

seed_data_creation: Used seed/reset endpoint to ensure known state (6 demo items). Created TEST_Custom Reminder for create test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Schedules module fully functional with collection 'pastry_production_reminders' (avoids legacy index conflict). 9 endpoints tested: summary (buckets + headline), grouped-by-day (for banner popup), list (with filters), get single, create, acknowledge (single + all), seed/reset. Advanced Cake Tools: 10 tools (airbrush, fondant-drape, silicone-molds, isomalt, stencils, modeling-chocolate, luster-dust, edible-image-print, buttercream-brush, drip-control) in 6 categories. Airbrush has ui='airbrush_3d_modal' for 3D modal. 4 airbrush nozzles (fine/medium/broad/splatter) with spread/falloff/opacity. All existing cake-assets endpoints still working.
